About Me 👋

Welcome to the Raji Zone: Where Code Meets AI ! 💻

🚀 AI Enthusiast | Innovator

Hi, I’m Rajalakshmi, a passionate AI & Machine Learning enthusiast with a deep interest in LLMs, NLP, Model Optimization, and Deep Learning. I love working on AI-driven solutions that solve real-world problems efficiently. I also specialize in Web-Development, integrating intelligent systems into scalable applications.

🎓 Education

📌 Karpagam College of Engineering – B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (2022 - 2026)
📌 Completed schooling from Ponnar higher Secondary School with a strong foundation in Mathematics & Computer Science.

📌 What Drives Me?

I believe in transforming AI research into impactful products. Whether it’s developing intelligent healthcare solutions or optimizing crop yield using AI, I strive to make technology accessible and meaningful.
